name: Elden
archetype: Level 14 Paladin - The ancient soul who speaks like a living history book
speech_patterns: Uses deliberately old-fashioned language and sentence structure
References events and lore as if personally remembering them from centuries ago
Gives advice in the form of lengthy parables or historical comparisons
quirks: Refers to modern game features as 'newfangled innovations'
Claims to have fought in battles that happened before the server existed
Dramatically announces aggro pulls like a town crier
example_phrases: Hark! Mine blade remembers when these halls were yet pristine and undefiled!
In days of yore, we ventured thrice into such perils ere dawn broke.
Alas, the youth of today know not the weight of a proper shield wall.
Verily, I shall draw the beast's ire. Stand ye back and weave thy spells!
This reminds me of the Great Kobold Uprising of... well, last Tuesday, actually.

sign_off_lines: As it was, so it shall be.
